text.title: Two-Pass: Free-Form Reasoning Then Structured Extraction Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the two-pass-reason-then-extract methodology end-to-end.

step.name: classify-task-difficulty
step.action: Score each on a 1-5 difficulty rubric (1=entity extraction; 5=multi-step proof / SWE-bench-class). Compute median + p90.
step.decision-gate: If median ≤ 2, single-pass is fine — skip this methodology.

step.name: design-pass-pair
step.action: Pick pass-1 model + thinking budget (Opus + 16K thinking for difficulty 4-5). Pick pass-2 model (Haiku / GPT-4.1-nano). Define transcript cap.

step.name: run-ab-eval
step.input: Eval set of 50+ tasks with ground truth + both pipelines configured
step.action: Run single-pass and two-pass against the eval set. Compute accuracy + cost per call for each.
step.decision-gate: If delta < 5% absolute, keep single-pass and document the result — do not deploy two-pass.

step.name: deploy-with-fallback
step.input: ab_baseline justifying the pattern + production prompt
step.action: Deploy two-pass behind a feature flag with single-pass as fallback when pass 2 schema-violates > 3% of calls.
step.output: Production traffic routed; fallback alerting wired

step.name: monitor-extraction-fidelity
step.action: Track pass-2 schema-violation rate weekly. If > 2%, the cap is too tight or the reasoning step needs better structuring hints.
step.output: Weekly fidelity report; alerts on regression
